message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'psmgr_bind' sets signal field 'socket.state', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=socket;field=state;offset=0] [oracle:assert=socket.state stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets state without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
